All existing configuration sections are fully populated with no placeholder markers.'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10 shows the skill detected the existing section ('`## Security Configuration` section exists with all fields fully populated (no `{{placeholder}}` markers)') and concluded 'Result: Security Configuration is up to date.' without any opt-in prompt. changes-log.md confirms 'No changes' for Security Configuration. No output file contains any opt-in prompt or interactive question about Security Configuration.
